title: oreomecon crocea
intro: Oreomecon crocea, also known as the golden fumewort, is a perennial plant species in the family Papaveraceae, native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Oreomecon crocea include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's root and leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
